Version: TU22 2026 FIRST Robotics Competition Game Manual
REBUILT presented by Haas

4 Game Overview
In REBUILT, two ALLIANCES of three teams each compete to score FUEL in their
HUB and climb their TOWER. During the first 20 seconds of the MATCH, ROBOTS
operate autonomously. During the remaining 2 minutes and 20 seconds, drivers
control their ROBOTS. During the final 30 seconds of the MATCH, the ENDGAME,
all HUBS are active and ROBOTS may climb their TOWER.

6.5 Point Values
Each FUEL scored in the active HUB during AUTO is worth 1 point.
Each FUEL scored in an active HUB during TELEOP is worth 1 point.

TOWER points are awarded as follows:
A ROBOT that achieves LEVEL 1 during AUTO earns 15 points.
A ROBOT that achieves LEVEL 1 during TELEOP earns 10 points.
A ROBOT that achieves LEVEL 2 earns 20 points.
A ROBOT that achieves LEVEL 3 earns 30 points.

6.6 Ranking Points
ENERGIZED: an ALLIANCE that scores at least 100 FUEL in their HUB earns 1
ranking point.
SUPERCHARGED: an ALLIANCE that scores at least 360 FUEL in their HUB earns 1
ranking point.
TRAVERSAL: an ALLIANCE that earns at least 50 TOWER points earns 1 ranking
point.
At the conclusion of the MATCH, the winning ALLIANCE is awarded 3 ranking
points. A tied MATCH awards each ALLIANCE 1 ranking point.
